ground_truth.title: Seattle Event Management & Planning · Event Coordinator & Rentals
ground_truth.main_content:
Event Management & Planning for Intimate Gatherings to Large‑scale Seattle Celebrations

Event Vision, Design, and Layout
Day of Event Management, Production and Logistics
Vendor Management including Contracts and Billing
Event Staffing and Management
Event Parking and Transportation
Permitting and Handling of Municipal Regulations
Venue Reservation and Logistics
Communicate and work with a Single Event Coordinator
Complete Supply and Event Rentals

Planning an event can take an incredible amount of time to get all of the details perfect. If you are hosting your next event in the greater Seattle area, you can bring 35 years of industry experience to your next convention, corporate conference, or celebration. Working with National Event Pros you call the shots—from full event production down to simple rentals and staff, you choose the extent of the relationship. Seattle is one of the most beautiful cities in the Northwest, and home to so many unique event locations. A National Event Pro event coordinator will help you plan and execute the event of your dreams, while accomplishing all of your objectives.

Endless Seattle Venues
The basis of any great event is a fantastic location. Choosing a space that can host all of your guests, entertainment, and activities can sometimes turn from fun to a troublesome challenge. Fortunately, in such a diverse, large area as Seattle, there are an incredible amount of options for small gatherings, all the way to conventions with thousands of attendees. We’ve worked with Corporate giants to turn Safeco Field and CenturyLink Field into evening of adventure. Turn the Snoqualmie tubing pass into a German-themed snow day—complete with Schnitzel and Beer. Seattle’s iconic pier locations make for great waterfront receptions to end a long conference week. Whatever event or location you have in mind, National Event Pros will work to secure your Venue choice and transform the space into your ideal experience.

Axis Pioneer Square
Axis has preserved 6000 square feet of the historic 1889 Globe Building in legendary Pioneer Square. This unique space features 18’ brick arch walls, hardwood floors, and touches of industrial modern design with a fantastic collection of globes. This unique venue is a blank slate—an event planner’s dream. From weddings to corporate events, the space can be tailored to fit most any event needs.

Emerald City Trapeze
Seattle’s SODO district is home to a distinctive venue with something very unique: a flying Trapeze school! With almost 20,000 square feet of functional, flexible, and visually stunning gathering space, it’s yours to utilize in your own unique way. And yes, you can incorporate lessons on flying trapeze, trampoline, aerial arts, pole dancing, or tumbling into the agenda!

Novelty Hill – Januik Winery
Novelty Hill – Januik Winery is a unique, upscale destination venue specializing in custom events that is located in the heart of Woodinville’s wine country. A modern setting for indoor or outdoor events, the space is designed to accommodate all types of events and adds some built-in fun: outdoor fireplaces, bocce ball, and wine tasting tours.

Floor 13
One of Seattle’s newest and most intimate event venues, Floor 13 is a beautiful, modern, versatile loft space designed for hosting intimate events. The industrial charm of exposed brick and beams paired with modernist and baroque elements, Floor 13 is conducive to socializing and entertaining in style.

Locally Sourced Seattle Event Rentals
Being headquartered in Seattle, National Event Pros maintains a massive inventory of Photo Booths, Tents, Extreme Attractions, Concessions, and so many more event rentals. Choose from unique interactive event rentals like Giant Lite-Brite or Giant Pac-Man. Rent bleeding edge technologies such as full motion VR Simulators. When you need event rentals, you need the peace of mind that your equipment will be functional, clean, and insured. It’s critical that you choose a vendor that has you and your event patrons as their number one priority. If we don’t have what you need in stock, we maintain an extensive network of trusted Seattle Event Partners that specialize in every kind of rental you could possible imagine.

HTC Vive VR Stations
Take your gaming experience to the next level with the latest in virtual reality (VR) gaming. We bring the likes of Google Tilt Brush, Zombie Apocalypse, and more to life with our HTC Vive "room scale" virtual reality headset.

Dual Mobile Zip Line
The ultimate extreme attraction! Take a leap of faith from our 30-ft tower on Washington's only mobile zip line. Make your event memorable—add a zip line!

Classic Arcade Games
A wide variety of arcade classics are available, including Asteroids, Donkey Kong, Pac-Man, Ms. Pac-Man, Jr. Pac-Man, and more.

Virtual Graffiti Wall
Step up your next trade show, wedding, or corporate event with this artistic take on a traditional photo booth. Guests take their photos against a background of choice before using digital "Spray Paint Cans" to tag their photo. When the participants are done with their masterpiece, a staff member will print the 4" x 6" photos for the guests to take home with them.

Giant Beer Pong
Nobody can deny that beer pong is a classic for any party especially when the warm weather hits. Now bring the fun to your next event in a larger than life way.

Giant Chess
Searching for Bobby Fisher! Find out who is the secret chess champion in your party, or teach the game to a friend or coworker. This game is great for guests ages 5 and up.

Professional Seattle Event Management & Staffing Services

Event Concierge Services
Guest Registration Services
Event Security
Entertainment Staffing
Janitorial Services
Wait Staff and Bartenders

Once you’ve completed all of the pre-planning for your event, there is still the critical moment of executing it. One of the most important factors is making sure that every guest interaction is a great one. The staff that are present at your event can either assist you or destroy you in that goal. We hire and train all of our internal team to be able to provide the best experience possible. With focus on punctuality, appearance, guest interaction, safety, and equipment knowledge, we leave nothing to chance. Make sure your Seattle event has a solid staffing plan in place.

Start with a free 30-minute event consultation.
Tell our event coordinator a little about your event, and they’ll get in touch to discuss the details.
